channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: India declares one-day national mourning for former Qatar Emir Sheikh Hamad Al-Thani

- US resumes strikes against Iran after latest Hormuz attacks
- Iran expands attacks on Gulf states after US strikes, says Strait of Hormuz closed
- U.S. Strikes Iran After Iran Fires on Ship in Strait of Hormuz
- US military says it is striking Iran in response to attack on civilian vessel in Strait of Hormuz
- US military says it is striking Iran in response to attack on civilian vessel in Strait of Hormuz

- U.S. military says it is striking Iran in response to attack on civilian vessel in Strait of Hormuz

- US senator and Trump ally Lindsey Graham dies aged 71
- US Senator And Trump Ally Lindsey Graham Dies Age 71
- US senator and Trump ally Lindsey Graham dies age 71

- US Senator and close Trump ally Lindsey Graham dies after 'brief and sudden illness'

- US Senator Lindsey Graham dies after 'brief and sudden illness'
- Lindsey Graham dies at 71; Trump pays tribute to Senator as 'one of the greatest people'
- Senator Lindsey Graham dies at 71

- Lindsey Graham, key Trump ally, dies after sudden illness
- US: Senator Lindsey Graham dies
- Trump's critic-turned-ally US Senator Lindsey Graham dies at 71

Matched Titles:
- British couple return to village at heart of deadly Spanish wildfire
- UK couple found burned and semi-conscious in Almería amid Spanish wildfires]]>

item.title: Iran declares Strait of Hormuz closed as 'unauthorised' vessel hit
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Iran Guards say closing Hormuz strait ‘until further notice’
- Iran's IRGC navy says Strait of Hormuz closed until further notice, state media reports
- Iran declares Hormuz closed after 'unauthorised' vessel hit, warns of 'severe response'
- IRGC Announces Closure of Strait of Hormuz Until US Intervention in Region Ends]]>

Matched Titles:
- Sinner fends off Zverev in power battle to retain Wimbledon crown

- Sinner beats Zverev to retain Wimbledon title]]>

item.title: Iranian newspaper names Trump, Netanyahu, Starmer among leaders on revenge list
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Iranian newspaper publishes list of ‘revenge’ targets

- Iran newspaper lists Trump, European leaders as revenge targets]]>

item.title: U.S. military says ‘traffic is flowing’ in Strait of Hormuz

item.title: U.S., U.K., and 12 other nations reaffirm 2016 ruling invalidating China’s claims in South China Sea

- US, UK and 12 other nations reaffirm 2016 ruling invalidating China's claims in South China Sea]]>

item.title: Toronto shooting: 2 killed, several injured at Salsa on St Clair festival; attacker at large
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Two dead, six injured after shooting at Toronto salsa festival

item.title: Former Spain PM criticised for ‘xenophobic’ remark on French World Cup team

- Spain Ex-PM Draws Criticism With 'Xenophobic' Remark On French Team
